CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Complaint For Failure To Amend And/Or Retain Counsel; Declaration Of Antoinette P. Hewitt
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS MELONIE GREEN, AFRICAN AMERICAN ART AND CULTURE COMPLEX, INC, AND MELORA GREEN's Motion To Dismiss Complaint For Failure To Amend And/Or Retain Counsel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to dismiss this matter with prejudice is granted. On November 20, 2024, this court sustained defendants' demurrer to plaintiff's First Amended Complaint with leave to amend. The court's order did not set a deadline for amendment; therefore, the default rule of 10 days applied. (Rule of Court 3.1320(g) ["Following a ruling on a demurrer, unless otherwise ordered, leave to answer or amend within 10 days is deemed granted, except for actions in forcible entry, forcible detainer, or unlawful detainer in which case 5 calendar days is deemed granted."].) Plaintiff has not yet amended nor sought additional time to retain counsel to amend. Where a demurrer is sustained and the plaintiff fails to amend, dismissal with prejudice is the appropriate order. (See CCP 581(f)(2); Cano v. Glover (2006) 143 Cal.App.4th 326, 330.)

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
